

# [Technology] Machine learning  (study pass 294)

**Summary.** Systems that improve at a task from data rather than explicit rules; deep neural networks learn layered representations.

Core idea: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if machine learning were false:
Systems that improve at a task from data rather than explicit rules; deep neural networks
learn layered representations. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the
assumptions doing the real work.

Why it matters: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if machine learning were
false: Systems that improve at a task from data rather than explicit rules; deep neural
networks learn layered representations. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and
exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

How it works: Systems that improve at a task from data rather than explicit rules; deep
neural networks learn layered representations. In study terms, the discipline is to separate
what is firmly established from what remains contested, and to state the level of evidence
explicitly when explaining it to others.

A concrete example: Considering machine learning, Systems that improve at a task from data
rather than explicit rules; deep neural networks learn layered representations. This bears
directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a careful student should be able
to reconstruct the reasoning from first principles rather than memorising it.

Common misconception: Systems that improve at a task from data rather than explicit rules;
deep neural networks learn layered representations. In study terms, the discipline is to
separate what is firmly established from what remains contested, and to state the level of
evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

Historical development: Considering machine learning, Systems that improve at a task from
data rather than explicit rules; deep neural networks learn layered representations. This
bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a careful student should be
able to reconstruct the reasoning from first principles rather than memorising it.

Practical application: Considering machine learning, Systems that improve at a task from

able to reconstruct the reasoning from first principles rather than memorising it.

Connection to other fields: Systems that improve at a task from data rather than explicit

# [Business] Unit economics  (study pass 294)

**Summary.** The profit of a single sale after direct costs. A business scales only when contribution margin is reliably positive.

is firmly established from what remains contested, and to state the level of evidence
explicitly when explaining it to others.

Why it matters: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if unit economics were
false: The profit of a single sale after direct costs. A business scales only when
contribution margin is reliably positive. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and
exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

contribution margin is reliably positive. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and

# [Business] Marketing funnel  (study pass 294)

means widening or plugging the biggest leak. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and
exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

# [Business] Cash flow  (study pass 294)

**Summary.** Timing of money in and out. Profitable businesses still fail if cash runs out before receivables arrive.

Core idea: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if cash flow were false: Timing
of money in and out. Profitable businesses still fail if cash runs out before receivables
arrive. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the
real work.

Why it matters: Considering cash flow, Timing of money in and out. Profitable businesses
still fail if cash runs out before receivables arrive. This bears directly on how the
underlying principles generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the
reasoning from first principles rather than memorising it.

How it works: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if cash flow were false:
Timing of money in and out. Profitable businesses still fail if cash runs out before
receivables arrive. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions
doing the real work.

A concrete example: Timing of money in and out. Profitable businesses still fail if cash
runs out before receivables arrive. In study terms, the discipline is to separate what is
firmly established from what remains contested, and to state the level of evidence
explicitly when explaining it to others.

Common misconception: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if cash flow were
false: Timing of money in and out. Profitable businesses still fail if cash runs out before
receivables arrive. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions

# [History] The computer age  (study pass 294)

**Summary.** From WWII code-breaking to the microprocessor, general-purpose computation became the defining technology of the modern era.

Core idea: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the computer age were false:
From WWII code-breaking to the microprocessor, general-purpose computation became the

is firmly established from what remains contested, and to state the level of evidence
explicitly when explaining it to others.

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 295)

**Summary.** A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it.

Core idea: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the scientific method were
false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is
falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. That counterfactual
sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

Why it matters: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the scientific method
were false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. That
counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

A concrete example: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision.
Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,
and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

Common misconception: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the scientific

# [Science] Quantum mechanics  (study pass 295)

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 296)

**Summary.** A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it.

Core idea: Considering the scientific method, A cycle of observation, hypothesis,
prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first
principles rather than memorising it.

were false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. That
counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

were false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. That
counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

# [Science] Thermodynamics  (study pass 296)

**Summary.** Energy is conserved (first law); entropy of an isolated system never decreases (second law). These bound every engine, cell and computation.

# [Science] Evolution by natural selection  (study pass 296)

# [Science] Quantum mechanics  (study pass 296)

**Summary.** Nature at small scales is probabilistic; observables are quantised and superposed until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors.

Core idea: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if quantum mechanics were
false: Nature at small scales is probabilistic; observables are quantised and superposed
until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors. That counterfactual
sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

Why it matters: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if quantum mechanics were
false: Nature at small scales is probabilistic; observables are quantised and superposed
until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors. That counterfactual
sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

How it works: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if quantum mechanics were
false: Nature at small scales is probabilistic; observables are quantised and superposed
until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors. That counterfactual
sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

A concrete example: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if quantum mechanics
were false: Nature at small scales is probabilistic; observables are quantised and
superposed until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors. That
counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

Common misconception: Nature at small scales is probabilistic; observables are quantised and
superposed until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,
and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

Historical development: Considering quantum mechanics, Nature at small scales is
probabilistic; observables are quantised and superposed until measured. It underpins
chemistry, lasers and semiconductors. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first
principles rather than memorising it.

Practical application: Nature at small scales is probabilistic; observables are quantised
and superposed until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,
and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

Connection to other fields: Considering quantum mechanics, Nature at small scales is
probabilistic; observables are quantised and superposed until measured. It underpins
chemistry, lasers and semiconductors. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first
principles rather than memorising it.

Open questions: Nature at small scales is probabilistic; observables are quantised and
superposed until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,
and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

Key takeaway for study: Considering quantum mechanics, Nature at small scales is

# [Science] Relativity  (study pass 296)

**Summary.** Space and time are unified and dynamic; gravity is curvature of spacetime. Predictions include time dilation, verified by GPS satellites daily.

Core idea: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if relativity were false: Space
and time are unified and dynamic; gravity is curvature of spacetime. Predictions include
time dilation, verified by GPS satellites daily. That counterfactual sharpens understanding
and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

Why it matters: Space and time are unified and dynamic; gravity is curvature of spacetime.
Predictions include time dilation, verified by GPS satellites daily. In study terms, the
discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested, and to
state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

How it works: Considering relativity, Space and time are unified and dynamic; gravity is
curvature of spacetime. Predictions include time dilation, verified by GPS satellites daily.
This bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a careful student
should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first principles rather than memorising it.

A concrete example: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if relativity were
false: Space and time are unified and dynamic; gravity is curvature of spacetime.
Predictions include time dilation, verified by GPS satellites daily. That counterfactual
sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

Common misconception: Considering relativity, Space and time are unified and dynamic;
gravity is curvature of spacetime. Predictions include time dilation, verified by GPS

Practical application: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if relativity were

Predictions include time dilation, verified by GPS satellites daily. That counterfactual

Connection to other fields: Space and time are unified and dynamic; gravity is curvature of

Open questions: Space and time are unified and dynamic; gravity is curvature of spacetime.
Predictions include time dilation, verified by GPS satellites daily. In study terms, the

# [Neuroscience] Action potential  (study pass 296)

**Summary.** A rapid, all-or-none reversal of membrane voltage driven by voltage-gated sodium and potassium channels; it propagates without loss.

separate what is firmly established from what remains contested, and to state the level of

# [Neuroscience] Synaptic plasticity  (study pass 296)

**Summary.** Synapses strengthen or weaken with activity (LTP/LTD); this is the cellular substrate of learning and memory.

Core idea: Synapses strengthen or weaken with activity (LTP/LTD); this is the cellular

firmly established from what remains contested, and to state the level of evidence

# [Neuroscience] Brain-computer interfaces  (study pass 296)

**Summary.** Systems that record neural activity, decode intent, and act on it — restoring communication or movement, ideally closing the loop with feedback.

decode intent, and act on it — restoring communication or movement, ideally closing the loop
with feedback. This bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a

# [Neuroscience] Neurotransmitters  (study pass 296)

# [Business] Marketing funnel  (study pass 296)

# [Business] Cash flow  (study pass 296)

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 297)

**Summary.** A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it.

Core idea: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the scientific method were
false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is
falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. That counterfactual
sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles

principles rather than memorising it.

# [Science] Quantum mechanics  (study pass 297)

**Summary.** Nature at small scales is probabilistic; observables are quantised and superposed until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors.

# [Neuroscience] Action potential  (study pass 297)

**Summary.** A rapid, all-or-none reversal of membrane voltage driven by voltage-gated sodium and potassium channels; it propagates without loss.

and potassium channels; it propagates without loss. In study terms, the discipline is to
separate what is firmly established from what remains contested, and to state the level of

# [Business] Marketing funnel  (study pass 297)

**Summary.** Awareness → interest → consideration → conversion → loyalty. Each stage leaks; optimisation means widening or plugging the biggest leak.

loyalty. Each stage leaks; optimisation means widening or plugging the biggest leak. This
bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a careful student should be

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 298)

**Summary.** A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it.

Core idea: Considering the scientific method, A cycle of observation, hypothesis,
prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first
principles rather than memorising it.

Why it matters: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,

power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. In study

# [Science] Thermodynamics  (study pass 298)

# [Science] Evolution by natural selection  (study pass 298)

**Summary.** Heritable variation plus differential reproductive success yields adaptation over generations. It explains life's diversity without foresight.

reproductive success yields adaptation over generations. It explains life's diversity
without foresight. This bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a
careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first principles rather

# [Neuroscience] Action potential  (study pass 298)

# [Business] Marketing funnel  (study pass 298)

**Summary.** Awareness → interest → consideration → conversion → loyalty. Each stage leaks; optimisation means widening or plugging the biggest leak.

bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a careful student should be

# [Business] Cash flow  (study pass 298)

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 299)

**Summary.** A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it.

Core idea: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,
and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

Why it matters: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the scientific method
were false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. That
counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

How it works: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,
and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

A concrete example: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the scientific
method were false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision.
Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. That

evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first

# [Science] Evolution by natural selection  (study pass 299)

# [Science] Quantum mechanics  (study pass 299)

Key takeaway for study: Considering the neuron, An electrically excitable cell that
integrates inputs on dendrites and fires action potentials down an axon to synapses. This
bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a careful student should be
able to reconstruct the reasoning from first principles rather than memorising it.

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 300)

**Summary.** A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it.

Core idea: Considering the scientific method, A cycle of observation, hypothesis,
prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first
principles rather than memorising it.

# [Science] Evolution by natural selection  (study pass 300)

**Summary.** Heritable variation plus differential reproductive success yields adaptation over generations. It explains life's diversity without foresight.

without foresight. This bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a

# [Science] The cell  (study pass 300)

logic. Miniaturisation drove Moore's law. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and
exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

# [Business] Marketing funnel  (study pass 300)

**Summary.** Awareness → interest → consideration → conversion → loyalty. Each stage leaks; optimisation means widening or plugging the biggest leak.

loyalty. Each stage leaks; optimisation means widening or plugging the biggest leak. This
bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a careful student should be
able to reconstruct the reasoning from first principles rather than memorising it.

# [History] The Industrial Revolution  (study pass 300)

**Summary.** Steam, factories and mechanisation (~1760+) multiplied output per worker and reshaped society and cities.

Core idea: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the industrial revolution
were false: Steam, factories and mechanisation (~1760+) multiplied output per worker and
reshaped society and cities. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the
assumptions doing the real work.

Why it matters: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the industrial
revolution were false: Steam, factories and mechanisation (~1760+) multiplied output per
worker and reshaped society and cities. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and
exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

How it works: Considering the industrial revolution, Steam, factories and mechanisation
(~1760+) multiplied output per worker and reshaped society and cities. This bears directly
on how the underlying principles generalise, and a careful student should be able to
reconstruct the reasoning from first principles rather than memorising it.

A concrete example: Considering the industrial revolution, Steam, factories and
mechanisation (~1760+) multiplied output per worker and reshaped society and cities. This
bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a careful student should be
able to reconstruct the reasoning from first principles rather than memorising it.

Common misconception: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the industrial
revolution were false: Steam, factories and mechanisation (~1760+) multiplied output per
worker and reshaped society and cities. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and
exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 301)

**Summary.** A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it.

Core idea: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the scientific method were
false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is
falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. That counterfactual
sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

Why it matters: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,
and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

were false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its

evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first

# [Science] Quantum mechanics  (study pass 301)

# [Science] Relativity  (study pass 301)

**Summary.** Space and time are unified and dynamic; gravity is curvature of spacetime. Predictions include time dilation, verified by GPS satellites daily.

Core idea: Space and time are unified and dynamic; gravity is curvature of spacetime.

discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested, and to
state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 302)

**Summary.** A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it.

Core idea: Considering the scientific method, A cycle of observation, hypothesis,
prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first
principles rather than memorising it.

were false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its

# [Science] Evolution by natural selection  (study pass 302)

**Summary.** Heritable variation plus differential reproductive success yields adaptation over generations. It explains life's diversity without foresight.

without foresight. This bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a

# [Science] Quantum mechanics  (study pass 302)

**Summary.** Nature at small scales is probabilistic; observables are quantised and superposed until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors.

semiconductors. This bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a

than memorising it.

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 303)

**Summary.** A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it.

Core idea: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,
and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

Why it matters: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,
and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

How it works: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,
and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

A concrete example: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the scientific
method were false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision.
Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. That
counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

Common misconception: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the scientific
method were false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision.
Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. That
counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

method were false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision.

# [Neuroscience] The neuron  (study pass 303)

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 304)

**Summary.** A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it.

Core idea: Considering the scientific method, A cycle of observation, hypothesis,
prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first
principles rather than memorising it.

Why it matters: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its
power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,
and to state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

How it works: Considering the scientific method, A cycle of observation, hypothesis,
prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles

principles rather than memorising it.

prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles

# [Science] Thermodynamics  (study pass 304)

yields adaptation over generations. It explains life's diversity without foresight. That
counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

Practical application: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if evolution by
natural selection were false: Heritable variation plus differential reproductive success
yields adaptation over generations. It explains life's diversity without foresight. That

# [Science] Quantum mechanics  (study pass 304)

**Summary.** Nature at small scales is probabilistic; observables are quantised and superposed until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors.

Core idea: Considering quantum mechanics, Nature at small scales is probabilistic;
observables are quantised and superposed until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and
semiconductors. This bears directly on how the underlying principles generalise, and a
careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first principles rather
than memorising it.

superposed until measured. It underpins chemistry, lasers and semiconductors. In study
terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,

# [Science] Relativity  (study pass 304)

**Summary.** Space and time are unified and dynamic; gravity is curvature of spacetime. Predictions include time dilation, verified by GPS satellites daily.

Core idea: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if relativity were false: Space
and time are unified and dynamic; gravity is curvature of spacetime. Predictions include
time dilation, verified by GPS satellites daily. That counterfactual sharpens understanding
and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested, and to
state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

# [Business] Marketing funnel  (study pass 304)

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 305)

**Summary.** A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if evidence could contradict it.

Core idea: Considering the scientific method, A cycle of observation, hypothesis,
prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first
principles rather than memorising it.

Why it matters: Considering the scientific method, A cycle of observation, hypothesis,
prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first
principles rather than memorising it.

How it works: Considering the scientific method, A cycle of observation, hypothesis,
prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first
principles rather than memorising it.

A concrete example: Considering the scientific method, A cycle of observation, hypothesis,
prediction, experiment and revision. Its power is falsifiability: a claim matters only if
evidence could contradict it. This bears directly on how the underlying principles
generalise, and a careful student should be able to reconstruct the reasoning from first

Common misconception: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if the scientific
method were false: A cycle of observation, hypothesis, prediction, experiment and revision.

# [Science] Thermodynamics  (study pass 305)

**Summary.** Energy is conserved (first law); entropy of an isolated system never decreases (second law). These bound every engine, cell and computation.

and exposes the assumptions doing the real work.

# [Business] Cash flow  (study pass 305)

**Summary.** Timing of money in and out. Profitable businesses still fail if cash runs out before receivables arrive.

arrive. That counterfactual sharpens understanding and exposes the assumptions doing the

# [Science] The scientific method  (study pass 306)

terms, the discipline is to separate what is firmly established from what remains contested,

# [Science] Evolution by natural selection  (study pass 306)

**Summary.** Heritable variation plus differential reproductive success yields adaptation over generations. It explains life's diversity without foresight.

Core idea: A useful mental model is to ask what would change if evolution by natural
selection were false: Heritable variation plus differential reproductive success yields

state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

state the level of evidence explicitly when explaining it to others.

# [Science] Relativity  (study pass 306)
